document_purpose: Synthetic de-identified fixture for tests. Mirrors representative shapes from the live docs-site initiatives.json (dirty legacy project status, initiative-level off-project links, sub-initiatives without substrate_doc, a substrate_doc pointing into a git-ignored dir, and two-level sub-initiative recursion).

initiatives.title: Fixture initiative one
initiatives.description: Top-level initiative whose substrate_doc targets a git-ignored directory, with sub-initiatives that exercise the optional substrate_doc field and recursive nesting.

projects.title: Fixture project with a dirty legacy status
projects.summary: Exercises INV-1/INV-3 lenient read on an out-of-enum legacy status value.
projects.description: Legacy status value predates the current 11-value PROJECT_STATUSES enum; must still parse ok:true on read.

sub-initiatives.title: Sub-initiative with a second git-ignored substrate_doc and nested sub-initiative

projects.title: Fixture nested project
projects.summary: Exercises z.lazy recursion two levels deep.
projects.description: Second-level nested project under a nested sub-initiative.

initiatives.title: Fixture initiative with transitional off-project links
initiatives.description: Mirrors the live initiative-4 (SDLC) shape — linked_tasks/linked_backlog carried at the initiative level rather than under a project (audit A3 transitional tolerance).
